rationale: The citing paper explicitly states it “extends prior latent-variable approaches that combine attitudinal and choice data,” and its core method is a simultaneous factor-choice model—directly aligned with the cited paper’s contribution of full-information joint latent-variable measurement and discrete choice estimation. Given this clear methodological lineage (and a direct DOI match in the reference list), this is plausibly a foundational/method source rather than an incidental mention.
